[A Revolutionary Ivan Kupala Celebration Gift]

Sensei, Schale prepared a celebration gift for the first event of 2022!
Please check your mailbox for your gift of Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 1/18/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))
